sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59125" key="kori/skh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορίσκη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κόρη</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:69:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">69.12</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0515.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Timocl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope> </bibl>:—hence <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορίσκιον</orth>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.17</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
